overview: Esper Midrange in Modern leverages efficient disruption and tempo plays to control the board state while gradually building value. By combining early hand disruption with versatile counterspells and resilient creatures like Psychic Frog, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents in resource exchanges. The goal is to stabilize early, trade favorably in the mid-game, and close out matches with superior card advantage and efficient threats.
win_conditions: Outlasting opponents through superior card advantage and efficient resource trading
Using Psychic Frog to generate continuous value and board presence while disrupting opponent's plans
Closing games with resilient threats that survive interaction and apply consistent pressure

keep_criteria: Hands containing Thoughtseize or Counterspell for early disruption
Two-land hands with a playable creature or interaction
Hands that can resolve Psychic Frog by turn two or three
mulligan_criteria: Hands with three or more lands and no interaction
Hands lacking any removal or counterspell
Hands with only high-cost threats and no early game plan

early_game: Play Thoughtseize on turn one to strip key combo pieces or early threats
Cast Psychic Frog to establish a resilient board presence and generate card advantage
Hold Counterspell for priority threats or to protect your Frog
mid_game: Trade efficiently by using Frog's abilities to remove opponent's creatures or generate value
Use Counterspell to protect your board state or punish opponent's key spells
Develop additional threats while maintaining enough mana for interaction
late_game: Leverage accumulated card advantage to outvalue opponents
Use Frog's recurring value to outlast control decks or overwhelm aggro
Close the game with efficient threats that are difficult to remove

key_cards.name: Thoughtseize
key_cards.notes: Use to strip combo pieces, early threats, or key interaction. Prioritize targets that slow down the opponent's game plan or enable your Frog to resolve safely.

key_cards.name: Psychic Frog
key_cards.role: Resilient value engine and board presence
key_cards.notes: Play early to establish a threat that generates card advantage. Use its abilities to remove opponent's creatures or draw cards, and protect it with Counterspell when necessary.

key_cards.name: Counterspell
key_cards.notes: Hold for priority threats, combo enablers, or to protect your board state. Use it to punish opponent's key spells or to enable your Frog to resolve and stick.

sequencing_tips: Hold Counterspell until you see the opponent's priority threat or need to protect Psychic Frog
Use Thoughtseize before casting Frog to clear the way for it to resolve safely
Prioritize trading Frog's abilities against opponent's creatures to generate value while maintaining board presence
Save interaction for spells that enable the opponent's win condition or remove your key threats

matchups.advice: Use Thoughtseize to strip early threats or key finishers. Play Psychic Frog early to establish a resilient board presence and use Counterspell to protect it or counter key removal.
Play around their counterspells by baiting them with Psychic Frog or using Thoughtseize to strip their key interaction. Use Counterspell to protect your threats and outvalue them in the late game.
Use Thoughtseize aggressively to strip key combo pieces. Hold Counterspell for the win condition or key enablers. Play Psychic Frog to disrupt their casting sequence and generate value.
Focus on efficient trades and card advantage. Use Thoughtseize to strip their key threats or interaction. Play Psychic Frog to generate value and use Counterspell to protect your board state.
